color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ① Pre-Compaction Memory Flush\nFlush critical facts to MEMORY.md\nbefore context is compacted

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ② Context Window Guards\nMonitor token count against model limit\ntrigger intervention thresholds

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ③ Tool Result Guard\nTruncate or summarize large tool outputs\nbefore re-injection into context

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ④ Turn-Based Limiting\nEnforce maximum turn count per session\nprevent runaway inference chains

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ⑤ Cache-Aware Pruning\nDrop turns that fall outside cache windows\nprioritize cache-hit candidates

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑥ Head/Tail Preservation
Retain system prompt (head) + latest turns (tail)
discard mid-session filler
[INVIOLABLE — never overridden by budget pressure]

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ⑦ Adaptive Chunk Sizing\nDynamically resize message batches\nbased on remaining context budget

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ⑧ Staged Summarization\nMulti-pass compression of older turns\ninto progressively shorter summaries

div.style: color: rgb(238, 238, 238) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Pruned context\nready for next inference call

div.style: color: rgb(170, 170, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Combined effect: prevents context overflow\nwithout losing semantically critical content\nCurrent recall baseline: ~60–70%
